info.description: Canonical API for the Personal OS control plane
info.title: Personal Sovereign Enterprise OS

schema.title: Response Get Audit Logs Api V1 Admin Audit Logs Get
Response List Dlq Messages Api V1 Admin Dlq Get
Response Replay Dlq Message Api V1 Admin Dlq  Message Id  Replay Post

parameters.description: Number of days to look back
parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of days to look back
schema.title: Days
Response Get Thread Messages Api V1 Email Threads  Thread Id  Messages Get

delete.description:
Clear all failed events from the dead letter queue.

Returns:
    Number of events cleared

get.description:
Get failed events from dead letter queue.

Returns:
    List of failed events with error details

delete.description:
Remove a failed event from the dead letter queue.

Args:
    index: Index of the failed event to remove

Returns:
    Success status

get.description:
Get event bus health status.

Returns:
    Health metrics including queue size and failed events

post.description:
Replay a failed event by index.

Args:
    index: Index of the failed event in the dead letter queue

Returns:
    Success status and event details

get.description:
Get event statistics.

Returns:
    Event emission counts by event type

schema.title: Response Get Job Stats Api V1 Jobs Stats Get
Response List Metrics Api V1 Metrics Get
Response Current Week Api V1 Metrics Current Week Get
Response Metric History Api V1 Metrics History Get
Response Loss Analysis Api V1 Metrics Loss Analysis Get

get.description:
List submissions using CQRS Query.

This endpoint demonstrates:
- Using ListSubmissionsQuery instead of direct DB access
- Using mediator.send_query() for query execution
- Using Result type for error handling

schema.title: Response List Submissions Api V1 Submissions Get

post.description:
Create submission using CQRS Command.

This endpoint demonstrates:
- Using CreateSubmissionCommand instead of direct DB insert
- Using mediator.send_command() for command execution
- Using Result type for error handling

patch.description:
Mark submission as lost using CQRS Command.

This endpoint demonstrates:
- Using MarkSubmissionLostCommand instead of direct DB update
- Using mediator.send_command() for command execution
- Using Result type for error handling

Mark submission as won using CQRS Command.

This endpoint demonstrates:
- Using MarkSubmissionWonCommand instead of direct DB update
- Using mediator.send_command() for command execution
- Using Result type for error handling
